TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_tmangux_abax, title = tmangux_abax, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/tmangux_abax} }

S.FORM: tmangux abax ginringan qa mbhkux payat kayal qani ga tmangux abax, garing saying byaling cyugal ski magal ryax ga t'aring qa tmangux abax qani. garing magal byaling magal ski pitu ryax gas i say maha tmsuqan qa tmangux abax qani la, tmangux abax laga si baqi maha sinpngan ryax qa gaga na sm'atu la Iyik qa tmangux abax qani, skura tltu qa cinbwanan qani ga nyan scobih hayi wagi, nyan si bnwan wagi krryax, ana kayal qani ga nyan mkilux uyi, nyan msqsya qa tlaka qani, baq hmor qsya qa llyung uyi. tmangux abax laga garing tmangux qabax abax ghoniq ro k'man uyi la, nyan si sphpah qa phpah qani, nyan sinhelax qabax qa qsinux qani, kpiyux sinbtwan qa qqsinux qani ga wayal sbatu uyi la. qbhniq qani ga shri plkan binah naňôsan, musa skura tltu na rroq qa musa mbhuyax kya nanak, mllamu na qsinux qsinux ga twang qsliq smoya mipu, tliqan kilux qa kayal ro piny'ugan na cinbwanan qani ga nyan maga; pin'yugan "inlungan" na cquliq ki pin'aaray yaw na hi ta uyi.

tmangux abax ginringan qa mbhkux payat kayal qani ga tmangux abax, garing saying byaling cyugal ski magal ryax ga t'aring qa tmangux abax qani. garing magal byaling magal ski pitu ryax gas i say maha tmsuqan qa tmangux abax qani la, tmangux abax laga si baqi maha sinpngan ryax qa gaga na sm'atu la Iyik qa tmangux abax qani, skura tltu qa cinbwanan qani ga nyan scobih hayi wagi, nyan si bnwan wagi krryax, ana kayal qani ga nyan mkilux uyi, nyan msqsya qa tlaka qani, baq hmor qsya qa llyung uyi. tmangux abax laga garing tmangux qabax abax ghoniq ro k'man uyi la, nyan si sphpah qa phpah qani, nyan sinhelax qabax qa qsinux qani, kpiyux sinbtwan qa qqsinux qani ga wayal sbatu uyi la. qbhniq qani ga shri plkan binah naňôsan, musa skura tltu na rroq qa musa mbhuyax kya nanak, mllamu na qsinux qsinux ga twang qsliq smoya mipu, tliqan kilux qa kayal ro piny'ugan na cinbwanan qani ga nyan maga; pin'yugan "inlungan" na cquliq ki pin'aaray yaw na hi ta uyi.
S.PHON: tmaŇčux aő≤ax …£inriŇčan qa mő≤ńßkux pajat kajal qani …£a tmaŇčux aő≤ax, …£ariŇč s~…ēajiŇč ő≤jaliŇč ¶~ ®ju…£al s~…ēki ma…£al rjax …£a t ĒariŇč qa tmaŇčux aő≤ax qani. …£ariŇč ma…£al ő≤jaliŇč ma…£al s~…ēki pitu rjax …£as~…ē i s~…ēaj mańßa tms~…ēuqan qa tmaŇčux aő≤ax qani la, tmaŇčux aő≤ax la…£a s~…ēi ő≤aqi mańßa s~…ēinpŇčan rjax qa …£a…£a na s~…ēm Ēatu la ijik qa tmaŇčux aő≤ax qani, s~…ēkura tltu qa ¶~ ®inő≤wanan qani …£a njan s~…ē ¶~ ®oő≤ińß ńßaji wa…£i, njan s~…ēi ő≤nwan wa…£i krrjax, ana kajal qani …£a njan mkilux uji, njan ms~…ēqs~…ēja qa tlaka qani, ő≤aq ńßmor qs~…ēja qa lljuŇč uji. tmaŇčux aő≤ax la…£a …£ariŇč tmaŇčux qaő≤ax aő≤ax …£ńßoniq ro k Ēman uji la, njan s~…ēi s~…ēpńßpańß qa pńßpańß qani, njan s~…ēinńßelax qaő≤ax qa qs~…ēinux qani, kpijux s~…ēinő≤twan qa qqs~…ēinux qani …£a wajal s~…ēő≤atu uji la. qő≤ńßniq qani …£a s~…ēńßri plkan ő≤inańß na*s~…ēan, mus~…ēa s~…ēkura tltu na rroq qa mus~…ēa mő≤ńßujax kja nanak, mllamu na qs~…ēinux qs~…ēinux …£a twaŇč qs~…ēliq s~…ēmoja mipu, tliqan kilux qa kajal ro pinj Ēu…£an na ¶~ ®inő≤wanan qani …£a njan ma…£a; pin Ēju…£an "inluŇčan" na ¶~ ®quliq ki pin Ēaaraj jaw na ńßi ta uji.
